mapper.update:
update em_alram_info set push_type = 1 where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select ai.*, wh.store_name, sr.storeroom_name, di.device_name, u.real_name as processingPersonName, u.id as processingPerson from em_alram_info ai LEFT JOIN em_storeroom sr on ai.storeroom_num = sr.storeroom_num LEFT JOIN em_warehouse wh on ai.store_num = wh.store_num LEFT JOIN em_device_info di on ai.device_code = di.device_code LEFT JOIN sys_user u on u.id = ai.processing_person ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t.alarm_type AS alarmType, CASE t.alarm_type WHEN 1 THEN '超员作业' WHEN 2 THEN '堵塞通道' WHEN 3 THEN '超高超量' WHEN 4 THEN '非法入侵' WHEN 5 THEN '摄像头遮挡偏移' END AS alarmTypeName, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(e.warning_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() THEN 1 END), 0) AS todaySum, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.processing_status = 0 THEN 1 END) AS unDealSum, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.alarm_type = t.alarm_type THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalSum FROM (SELECT 1 AS alarm_type UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5) t LEFT JOIN em_alram_info e ON t.alarm_type = e.alarm_type AND e.company_code = #{companyCode}
GROUP BY t.alarm_type, alarmTypeName ORDER BY t.alarm_type;

SELECT w.store_name AS `storeName`, d.device_name AS `deviceName`, CASE e.alarm_type WHEN 1 THEN '超员作业' WHEN 2 THEN '堵塞通道' WHEN 3 THEN '超高超量' WHEN 4 THEN '非法入侵' WHEN 5 THEN '摄像头遮挡偏移' ELSE '未知类型' END AS `alarmType`, e.alarm_file AS `alarmPic`, e.warning_date AS `alarmStartTime`, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, `warning_date`, NOW()) AS `duration` FROM `em_alram_info` e left join em_device_info d on e.device_code = d.device_code left join em_warehouse w on w.store_num = d.store_num WHERE e.processing_status = 0 AND e.company_code = #{companyCode} AND e.warning_date >= CURDATE() AND e.warning_date < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY e.alarm_type;

SELECT e.alarm_type as alarmType, e.id, wh.store_name as storeName, di.device_name as deviceName, e.device_code as deviceCode FROM em_alram_info e left join em_warehouse wh on e.store_num = wh.store_num and wh.company_code = e.company_code left join em_device_info di on e.device_code = di.device_code and di.company_code = e.company_code where e .company_code = #{companyCode} and e.alarm_status = 0 ORDER BY e.warning_date desc;
mapper.update: update em_alram_info set alarm_status = 1,gmt_modified = now() where company_code = #{companyCode}
